name: orbit
description: Hub-and-spoke multi-agent team framework. Triple Crown verification requires superpowers (quality prong), GSD (completeness prong), and gstack (behavior prong) as companion plugins. Claude Code required for enforcement.

interface.shortDescription: Hub-and-spoke multi-agent team with Triple Crown verification
interface.longDescription: Orbit provides a structured lifecycle for software delivery: plan, approve, implement, verify. Seven roles (leader/architect/builder/explore/critic/reviewer/researcher), hub-and-spoke communication, and Triple Crown three-pronged verification (completeness/behavior/quality). Triple Crown verification requires superpowers, GSD, and gstack as companion plugins.
